name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed
notes: Edit this BB to include all events that indicate modification to accounts or groups.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Group Added, Authentication.Group Changed, Authentication.Group Member Added, Authentication.Computer Account Added, Authentication.Computer Account Changed, Authentication.Policy Added, Authentication.Policy Change, Authentication.Trusted Domain Added, Authentication.User Account Added, Authentication.User Account Changed, Authentication.User Right Assigned
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed on events which are detected by the undefined system

AND where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Group Added, Authentication.Group Changed, Authentication.Group Member Added, Authentication.Computer Account Added, Authentication.Computer Account Changed, Authentication.Policy Added, Authentication.Policy Change, Authentication.Trusted Domain Added, Authentication.User Account Added, Authentication.User Account Changed, Authentication.User Right Assigned
